feed.title: Maine Board of Overseers of the Bar — General News
feed.subtitle: No dedicated news archive exists; the homepage's 'News' section is irregular free-text with no per-item dates or stable structure, so this is monitored by full-page fingerprint rather than per-item extraction.

entry.title: Page updated: Maine Board of Overseers of the Bar — General News
entry.content: This page's content changed since the last check. Visit the page directly to review the update. What changed (text excerpt): Added: + FY27 Annual Attorney Registration is Open + Attorney license renewal and Guardian ad Litem license renewal may be completed in the MyBoardAccess portal from July 1 through August 31, 2026 at 5:00 pm. + Pursuant to M. Bar R. 4, + Registration documents and payments received after August 31st will be assessed a non-waivable late fee. + We greatly appreciate your updated contact information, proxy, and IOLTA account listing, and service email for court service and notices. + If your status has changed since last year: + new law clerk + clerkship ended or is ending soon + retired seeking to be Inactive + new judge + no longer a judge + active military or changing status + seeking to become active again + Before you register in the portal, please contact + execassistant@mebaroverseers.org + to request a status change. + Please note, if you still owe a CLE late fee your license renewal/registration cannot be approved until that is resolved. + Registration is completed online on the + MyBoardAccess + by clicking on the Renew Registration section of the Board's web portal. A confirmation email will automatically be sent to you from informe.org when your registration is approved. + 7/1/2026 + In re: Felix R. Hagenimana + Single Justice + Receiver Appointment [PDF] + Receiver Appointment Order + 7/1/2026 + Board of Overseers of the Bar v. Felix R. Hagenimana, Esq. + Single Justice + Suspension Immediate Interim Suspensi [diff truncated]
